creator: andy@neu.net
text:
On Tue, 21 May 2013, kit wrote:

> patch to fix compilation when md2 does not exist.
>
> kit
>

Hi:

Thank you, I confirm that your patch works.  I am able to build and run 
Nessus:
===>   Compressing manual pages for nessus-gtk2-2.2.9_1
===>   Registering installation for nessus-gtk2-2.2.9_1
Installing nessus-gtk2-2.2.9_1... done

Thank you for your reply and fix.

AN
